chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4299 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.18351/2022 2. For hearing of main case 22-01-2025. Mr. Muhammad Faheem Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Khadim Ali Kaka Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.2 which is taken on record. This petition impugns a Notice dated 31.05.2022. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that this petition may be dispose of with direction that the Department to decide the notice after providing opportunity to the Petitioner impounding such determination no further coercive action be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Department resisted no cavil to the aforesaid. Petition is disposed of in above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
